stories.title: Cooper Flagg Scores 45 — Back-to-Back 40-Point Rookie Games, First Since Iverson 1997

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
51 points Thursday. 45 points Saturday.

Cooper Flagg just became the first rookie with back-to-back 40-point games since Allen Iverson in 1997. 🔥

He's 19. He's doing it without Luka. This is HIS team now.

#HoopHeroes #Mavericks

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
45 PTS. 9 AST. 8 REB.

Cooper Flagg vs. LeBron James last night — and Flagg won the game. 🏀

First rookie since Iverson with back-to-back 40-point games. The Mavs ended their 14-game home losing streak. Everything is different now.

#HoopHeroes #Mavericks #NBA

article.headline: Cooper Flagg Scores 45, Makes Back-to-Back 40-Point Rookie History

stories.title: Steph Curry Returns — Warriors Lose Heartbreaker 117-116 to Rockets

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Steph Curry. Off the bench. For the first time in 14 YEARS.

29 points. 5-of-10 from three. In 26 minutes.

Warriors still lost 117-116. Sengun hit the go-ahead with 11 seconds left. 😮

#HoopHeroes #Warriors

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
After 27 games and two months away, Steph Curry came back looking EXACTLY like Steph Curry.

29 points on 5 threes. Warriors still lost by 1.

KD with 31. Sengun with the dagger. The Rockets are READY. 🔥

#HoopHeroes #Rockets #Warriors

article.headline: Curry Returns With 29 Points Off the Bench — Warriors Lose 117-116 Heartbreaker to Rockets

stories.title: Jokic on Pace for Back-to-Back Triple-Double Season Averages — Joins Westbrook in History

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Nikola Jokić is averaging 27.7 / 13.0 / 10.8 with 6 games left.

Only one player in NBA history has averaged a triple-double in back-to-back full seasons.

That player's name is Russell Westbrook. Jokić is about to join him. 👀

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets

article.headline: Jokic on the Verge of Joining Westbrook With Back-to-Back Triple-Double Season Averages

stories.title: MVP Race Final Stretch — SGA -260, Wembanyama +250 With Six Games Left

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
SGA: -260 MVP favorite. Kia Ladder: Wemby at No. 1.

6 games left. The MVP race is officially NOT over. 👀

SGA is one of the great guards in NBA history. Wemby is doing things nobody has seen at 22.

This is the best MVP debate in years.

#HoopHeroes #MVP #NBA

stories.title: Luka Doncic Reportedly Flying to Europe for Hamstring Treatment — Playoff Status Uncertain

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Luka Dončić is reportedly flying to Europe for specialized hamstring treatment.

Playoffs start April 18. That's 12 days. Grade 2 hamstring typically takes 4-8 weeks.

Lakers fans are holding their breath. 😬

#HoopHeroes #Lakers

article.headline: Luka Doncic Reportedly Heads to Europe for Hamstring Treatment With Playoffs 12 Days Away

stories.title: West Play-In Bracket Finalized — PHX vs. GSW, POR vs. LAC on April 14

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
WEST PLAY-IN BRACKET IS SET 🔥

7 vs. 8: Phoenix Suns vs. Golden State Warriors
9 vs. 10: Portland Trail Blazers vs. LA Clippers

Steph Curry just came back. You do NOT want to face the Warriors in a one-game playoff.

April 14. Prime Video. 🏀

#HoopHeroes #NBA #PlayIn
